economic_notes: Band holds 33.33% interest in Tahltan Nation Development Limited Partnership (TNDLP) which provides construction and support services to various industries. Also holds interest in Tahltan Legacy Corporation which owns interest in Volcano Creek Hydroelectric Facility. Participates in BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing Limited Partnership. IBDC operates Kluachon Centre Store (cafe, retail, groceries, gas, general merchandise).
notes: Audit is qualified on multiple bases: (1) Iskut Band Development Corporation and its subsidiaries (Kluachon Centre Store, Eagle River Guide Outfitters, Kluachon Guide Outfitters, Zetu Construction) are accounted for under modified equity method instead of full consolidation as required by PSAS; (2) 33.33% interests in Tahltan Nation Development LP, Tahltan Nation Development Corp, and Tahltan Legacy Corp — auditor could not determine if these constitute shared control for modified equity method; (3) 33% interest in Tahltan Heritage Trust — auditor could not determine if portfolio investment or partnership subject to shared control. TNDLP financial info used is one year lagged (2021 actuals used for 2022 reporting). Revenue in statement of operations is $12,843,862 excluding the GBE income of $6,279,442; total_government_transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + FNHA + FNESC + Province of BC = 4,932,087 + 105,651 + 2,733,212 + 434,912 + 280,404 = 8,486,266. annual_debt_service = long-term debt repayment $264,451 + capital lease repayment $82,775 = $347,226. No remuneration schedule found in document.
